content: We can reframe Self-Refine's generic single-chain iterative refinement pipeline to integrate multiple inconsistent solving perspectives from modern LLM self-reflection mechanisms, creating a multi-perspective self-refinement framework that retains Self-Refine's core advantage of requiring no extra training or supervised data. This hybrid framework would resolve the key limitation of vanilla Self-Refine that it often gets stuck in local optima by repeating the same unrecognized biases in its single self-feedback chain.
